zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Richard de Legh於1220年出生在英國英格蘭爾希 萊時，他的父親Richard IV De Legh Lord Of West Hall20歲，母親Margery de Holgrave23歲。他於大約1235年與Margery De Holgrove在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1287年在他的家鄉享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Richard de Legh was born in 1220, in High Legh, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard IV De Legh Lord Of West Hall, was 20 and his mother, Margery de Holgrave, was 23. He married Margery De Holgrove about 1235, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1287, in his hometown, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Richard de Legh est né en 1220, à High Legh, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard IV De Legh Lord Of West Hall, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margery de Holgrave, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margery De Holgrove environ 1235, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1287, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Richard de Leghが1220年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヒグ レグで生まれた時，父Richard IV De Legh Lord Of West Hallは20歳，母Margery de Holgraveは23歳であった。約1235年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでMargery De Holgroveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1287年に故郷で67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Richard de Legh(이)가 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 히 레그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard IV De Legh Lord Of West Hall(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery de Holgrave(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1235년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Margery De Holgrove(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1287년 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Richard de Legh родился в 1220 г. в местности хаи лег, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard IV De Legh Lord Of West Hall было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery de Holgrave, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery De Holgrove около 1235 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1287 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет.
